info.title: warn: QdrantSkillsMCP.Embedding.ONNX[0]
info.description:
No embedding provider configured. Defaulting to LocalONNX which requires native ONNX runtime. If this fails, set EmbeddingProvider to OpenAI or Ollama via: qdrant-skills-mcp --config set EmbeddingProvider=OpenAI
